Electrical Models
=================

FlexGridPy's electrical models build a **Pyomo optimization problem** on top of a
`pandapower <https://pandapower.readthedocs.io>`_ network. The central class is
:class:`~flexgridpy.electrical_models.Manager.Manager`, which provides a unified API
for sets, parameters, variables, and constraints.

Each function is documented on its own page with:

* Description of what it does
* Mathematical formulation (equations)
* Parameter / argument tables
* API reference (autogenerated from source)
* Usage example

Recommended Workflow
--------------------

.. code-block:: python

   mgr = Manager(net)
   mgr.addTime(timeframe=24, time_interval=60)
   mgr.initialize_sets()
   mgr.line_param(Y_bus, ...)
   mgr.load_profile_param(profiles, "Load_P", "Load_Q")
   mgr.initialize_voltage_square_variables("voltage")
   mgr.initialize_branch_square_variables(...)
   mgr.add_active_power_flow_df_wos_constraint(...)
   mgr.add_voltage_power_flow_df_wos_constraint(...)
   mgr.add_brunch_current_flow_df_wos_SOCP_constraint(...)
